name: Process Improvement
purpose: The purpose is to continually improve the organization’s effectiveness and efficiency through the processes used and ensure alignment of the processes with the business needs.

outcomes.text: Commitment is established to provide resources to sustain improvement measures.
Issues arising from the organization's internal or external environment are identified as improvement opportunities and justified as reasons for change.
Analysis of the current status of the existing process is performed.
Improvement goals are identified and prioritized, and consequent changes to the process are defined, documented and implemented.
The effects of process implementation are monitored, measured and confirmed against the identified improvement goals.
Knowledge gained from the improvement is communicated within the organization.

basePractices.title: Establish commitment
basePractices.description: Establish commitment to support the process improvement staff, to provide resources and further enablers to sustain improvement actions. organizational level, process level, project level, etc.) and which can be used to improve all processes.

basePractices.title: Identify improvement measures
basePractices.description: Identify issues from the analysis of process performance and derive improvement opportunities with justified reasons for change. Assurance and Verification results and records (see SUP.1), validation results and records, and product quality metrics like defect rate. customer's satisfaction reports, measurements of organizational effectiveness/efficiency, costs of quality.

basePractices.title: Prioritize improvements
basePractices.description: Prioritize the improvement goals and improvement measures.

basePractices.title: Implement process improvement measures
basePractices.description: Implement and apply the improvements to the processes. Update the Process documentation and train people as needed. infrastructure, process training, process coaching and tailoring processes to local needs.

basePractices.title: Confirm process improvement
basePractices.description: The effects of process implementation are monitored and measured, and the achievement of defined improvement goals is confirmed.

basePractices.title: Communicate results of improvement
basePractices.description: Knowledge gained from the improvements and progress of the improvement implementation is communicated to affected parties. PIM.3 Process Improvement 1 emoctuO 2 emoctuO 3 emoctuO 4 emoctuO 5 emoctuO 6 emoctuO
